final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire J,  
    input wire K,  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire preset,  
    output reg Q  
);  

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge preset) begin  
    if (rst)  
        Q <= 1'b0;  
    else if (preset)  
        Q <= 1'b1;  
    else begin  
        case ({J, K})  
            2'b00: Q <= Q;         // No change  
            2'b01: Q <= 1'b0;      // Reset  
            2'b10: Q <= 1'b1;      // Set  
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;        // Toggle  
        endcase  
    end  
end  
endmodule
